claim: Managing token quotas across thousands of power users requires 24/7 monitoring and SRE teams to enforce hard stops
actionable: At large scale, implement quota management with automated monitoring and on-call teams to prevent runaway usage on shared clusters
source_title: How Google DeepMind Runs Agents at Scale

claim: Internal teams at Google get worse token quotas than paying customers by design to prioritize customer service
actionable: In multi-tenant systems, explicitly prioritize external customers and limit internal usage to ensure service reliability
source_title: How Google DeepMind Runs Agents at Scale

claim: Skills libraries follow a Darwinian model where only the strongest and most-used skills survive as engineers contribute en masse
actionable: Build skill/tool libraries where usage metrics determine which skills are maintained and promoted to other teams
source_title: How Google DeepMind Runs Agents at Scale

claim: Mixing different capability-tier models (free Gemma, advanced Gemini) in agentic systems optimizes cost and performance
actionable: Route complex reasoning tasks to advanced models and simple tasks to free/cheaper models based on task requirements
source_title: How Google DeepMind Runs Agents at Scale

claim: Evaluation of complex agentic workflows requires custom sandboxed environments and mock compute resources for testing
actionable: Use mock TPUs and sandboxed environments to test agentic flows without burning actual compute resources
source_title: How Google DeepMind Runs Agents at Scale

claim: Deep Research pipeline is transitioning from passing large context blobs to using shared file systems for component collaboration
actionable: Design multi-step research agents where components share files and artifacts instead of concatenating all results in a single context
source_title: How Google DeepMind Runs Agents at Scale

claim: Agent trajectory stores track exact steps and decision points to diagnose when agents enter loops or go off-track
actionable: Build logging systems that record all agent steps, allowing you to drill down and identify where agents failed or looped
source_title: How Google DeepMind Runs Agents at Scale

claim: Skills libraries for coding need language-specific auto-review models fine-tuned on style guides and past good examples
actionable: Create language-specific models that review code against your style guides and give signals on code quality
source_title: How Google DeepMind Runs Agents at Scale
